PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'services/berichtensessiecache/src/main'; then ./mvnw test -pl services/berichtensessiecache -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
PostToolUse.description: Run tests after editing source files

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'target/generated-sources'; then echo 'BLOCK: Gegenereerde code mag niet handmatig worden aangepast. Wijzig de OpenAPI spec.' && exit 1; fi
PreToolUse.description: Block edits to generated OpenAPI sources
